title: 反擊柒婆奸計 國際文宣戰 （含英文求救passage）

replies.msg:
（請唔好因為我係P牌而ignore我）

背景：
柒婆呢兩日ge舉動一般人（以致國際社會）以為係回應香港抗爭運動
但係心水清ge大家都知道佢根本唔係講比我地聽
1. 琴日個段Reuter's 流出ge 錄音, 係人都知同商家/政客私人會面唔會講呢d Oxford English. 根本就係向國際社會博同情
2. 今日佢話撤回，扮到想同示威者對話，目的係想美國國會以為“香港政府都回應緊啦，呢d佢地內部事務，唔洗人權法干涉“

我可以話你聽，今次比佢得逞，將會係香港ge END GAME, 結局係所有香港人以後收皮ge END GAME!!!

因為當國際社會以為Water Revolution 告一段落，唔再為我地向港共施壓，柒婆就可以為所欲為。清算示威人，白色恐怖，黑警濫權不斷升級。 送中條例亦會跟一下圖表發展：


我地要做ge野：
針對柒婆ge行動，同佢打國際文宣戰！[/gold][/size=5][/b]
從佢ge反應，唯一可以制衡佢ge只有國際壓力。大家著力做對內港人ge文宣，不如全力做國際文宣。
1. 開tweeter, 解釋香港情況係林鄭宣布“撤回”之後比之前更黑暗。 不斷tween比國際政客，Trump
2. 如果有國外朋友道賀，一定要同佢解釋
3. 文宣圖，facebook post, whatsapp 全部轉英文

拆穿柒婆詭計，向外求救（歡迎大家令去用/ 加以修改）：
IT'S NOT AN END TO WATER REVOLUTION, HONG KONG IS IN DESPERATE SITUIATION

Carrie Lam's (Chief Executive of HKSAR) speech today about "withdrawing" the "Extradition Bill" has misled the international society that the dispute between the government and protesters is in resolution, but the fact is nothing near.

The "Withdrawal" of Extradition Bill will be put into debate in a Pro-government Legislative Council. If there is not enough vote supporting the withdrawal (which is more than likely), the bill will be passed after further votings.

Over these three months, Hongkongers are living under totalitarianism. Peaceful protesters are treated with violence, female protesters are being sexually harassed by police. The government is spreading White Terror every single day and restricting the basic human rights of Hong Kong citizens.

Carrie Lam showed no actual will to communicate and ignored the following claims of the citizens:
1. Independent Investigation Committee for the excessive violence and the sexual harassment done by the Hong Kong Police Force
2. Release the protesters who are arrested due to political suppression.
3. Withdraw the labelling of "Riot" to Water Revolution
4. Immediately practice true universal suffrage.

The only way to a true apply pressure the Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Act.
Hong Kong is under extreme White Terror and we desperately need your support. Please help spread the truth of Hong Kong's desperate situation and help us fight for freedom, human rights and democracy!
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

用#Chinazi黎connect全世界

殘酷既現實係，並唔係所有黃絲都支持勇武。但黃絲最驚就係共產黨打到黎，一於用反共connect呢班淺黃!

中立/藍絲既上一輩，全部都係親身經歷過六四既年代，唔少甚至係大陸生活過。係大陸生活上所面對既不公義、中共點砌人生豬肉、佢地可能比我地感受更深。佢地唔會否認對共產黨既恐懼！一齊黎喚醒佢地對中共既不信任！

3. Connect全世界
Nazi既惡行到今時今日都依然係全世界既傷口，但佢地未必注意到係21世紀有個同Nazi不遑多讓既Chinazi！用#chinazi旗加海量文宣，話比佢地知我地既共同敵人係中共！


目標：全香港市民都知到呢個符號！
請大家用各種創意方法令大家知道呢道Chinazi旗！
記住！存在即勝利！

10.於高處發射催淚彈
11.港鐵在沒有足夠時間通知及指引市民離開的情況下封站及停駛,導致市民被困於西營盤站及遭受警方的恐怖襲擊
12.使用多部卧底車輛在街上引誘或攔截市民及拘捕
13.阻止救護人員入地鐵站內救人,或會導致傷者失救

18.在拘捕及拘留被捕者時作出大量侵犯人權的舉動,包括在如廁時強制不准關門,以廁所水當作食水供被捕者飲用
19.在使用扶手電梯使踩著市民的頭部
20.在拘留其間提供及被捕者的飯盒份量極少,嚴重苛待被捕人士
21.故意推遲被捕人士如廁的時間,有被捕人士更要由晚上苦等至早上11點才能如廁
22.故意阻止及延遲被捕人士聯絡律師,導致他們在被捕時的權利受到嚴重剝削
23.警方聲稱被捕傷者均送往廣華醫院,實際上當晚所有傷者均是送往瑪嘉瑪醫院,有欺騙市民之嫌
24.有被捕人士發現被捕人士有至少70人,明顯與警方公告數字有出入
25.有被捕人士發現警員手上持有被捕名單,當中知名人士名字有特別標示,及後亦有當時人表明當日沒有不公義對待,顯然執法不公

4.在無預警下衝擊,以警棍,胡椒噴霧及催淚彈攻擊在場記者及救援人員
5.濫發催淚彈致在場一名救援人員嚴重過敏需要送院
6.拘捕市民時刻意用手掩蓋被捕者的口阻止其說出個人資料,嚴重侵犯人權及妨礙司法公正
7.有女生被捕時被一防暴警用腳踩手
8.有防暴警在執法時異常亢奮地來回跳躍及揮拳舞盾,表現極不專業及有暴力傾向
9.濫用私刑
903
1.大力撲低一名學生導致其撞甩2隻牙
2.開槍射擊市民大腿
3.截停巴士及在巴士上大規模搜袋及濫捕
4.在被捕者說出個人資料時大叫阻止社工聯絡其家人
5.在太子站濫用武力導致有市民嚴重受傷，如頸椎移位,骨折及口吐鮮血
6.傷者昏迷時不恰當地移動及拖行他,或會造成二次傷害,顯得警員十分不專業,亦無足夠急救知識

IT'S NOT AN END TO WATER REVOLUTION, HONG KONG IS IN DESPERATE SITUIATION

Carrie Lam's (Chief Executive of HKSAR) speech today about "withdrawing" the "Extradition Bill" has misled the international society that the dispute between the government and protesters is in resolution, but the fact is nothing near.

The "Withdrawal" of Extradition Bill will be put into debate in a Pro-government Legislative Council. If there is not enough vote supporting the withdrawal (which is more than likely), the bill will be passed after further votings.

Over these three months, Hongkongers are living under totalitarianism. Peaceful protesters are treated with violence, female protesters are being sexually harassed by police. The government is spreading White Terror every single day and restricting the basic human rights of Hong Kong citizens.

Carrie Lam showed no actual will to communicate and ignored the following claims of the citizens:
1. Independent Investigation Committee for the excessive violence and the sexual harassment done by the Hong Kong Police Force
2. Release the protesters who are arrested due to political suppression.
3. Withdraw the labelling of "Riot" to Water Revolution
4. Immediately practice true universal suffrage.

The only way to a true apply pressure the Hong Kong Human Rights and Democracy Act.
Hong Kong is under extreme White Terror and we desperately need your support. Please help spread the truth of Hong Kong's desperate situation and help us fight for freedom, human rights and democracy!

我覺得Benedict 講得好好
中晒點 全世界睇完都會明點解政府已經“讓步”但抗爭者都停唔停

https://twitter.com/benedictrogers/status/1169160336794148864?s=19

1/4 Carrie Lam's announcement to withdraw extradition bill is welcome but is far too little,far too late.If she had done this three,even two, maybe even one month ago,people might have accepted it. Now, instead,several things to say: #HongKong #DemocracyForHK #StandWithHongKong

2/4 first, with police brutality & arbitrary arrests at a severe & shocking level, arguably cynics might say she has turned Hong Kong into a police state so no need for extradition bill anyway anymore

3/4 second, IF she sincerely wants to resolve the crisis she must announce a full, immediate, independent inquiry into police brutality with enforcement powers for dismissal and prosecution of those officers who used disproportionate force and carried out acts of brutal violence

4/4 And she must now recognise the problem isn't just the bill, it's the system itself, so should announce package of democratic political reforms including full universal suffrage for all LegCo seats in 2020 election and full universal suffrage for Chief Executive election 2022

If she does this, there's a chance that Hong Kong can heal and recover. If she doesn't, with the incredible courage and determination of amazing Hong Kongers, there's no chance that protests will cease.

仲有呢個，隔離post見倒（https://lihkg.com/thread/1541654/page/1）

美國國會議員 Jim McGovern

⚠️⚠️麻煩推爆佢，話比啲外國人知單嘢未完⚠️⚠️

Today, the leader of Hong Kong, Carrie Lam, proposed a motion of the withdrawal of the extradition bill. This, however, does not signify the victory of our battle.

In the press release, the leader blatantly dismissed the other four demands of two million protestors, including the establishment of an independent commission of inquiry and universal suffrage. Also, the bill is still NOT FORMALLY withdrawn as the retraction is a mere motion that can be vetoed by the pro-Beijing camp of the legislative body. Our demands are still not met.

The fugitive bill saga reveals the abuse of power of the police and the tightening grip of freedom from Beijing. Since June, we have seen the police force harming civilians in train stations; Beijing threatening to mobilise the garrison. To Hongkongers, the protest is now an act of resistance against police brutality and the narrowing freedom taken away by China. We are fighting for our future.

In such difficult time, we would love to ask for your support. Your understanding of our situation is important to pressurise the government.

We shall never surrender. Please support us.

TL;DR: It isn’t fucking over; Carrie Lam’s playing with words

IT'S NOT AN END TO WATER REVOLUTION, HONG KONG IS IN DESPERATE SITUIATION

Carrie Lam's (Chief Executive of HKSAR) speech today about "withdrawing" the "Extradition Bill" has misled the international society that the dispute between the government and protesters is in resolution, but the fact is nothing near.

The "Withdrawal" of Extradition Bill will be put into debate in a Pro-government Legislative Council. If there is not enough vote supporting the withdrawal (which is more than likely), the bill will be passed after further votings.

Over these three months, Hongkongers are living under totalitarianism. Peaceful protesters are treated with violence, female protesters are being sexually harassed by police. The government is spreading White Terror every single day and restricting the basic human rights of Hong Kong citizens.

1. Independent Investigation Committee for the excessive violence and the sexual harassment done by the Hong Kong Police Force
2. Release the protesters who are arrested due to political suppression.
3. Withdraw the labelling of "Riot" to Water Revolution
4. Immediately practice true universal suffrage.
